name: Broccoli Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut broccoli into long-stemmed florets and blanch them.
2. Drain the broccoli well.
3. Slice red pepper thinly.
4. Preheat oven to 325°F.
5. Place a layer of broccoli in the pie shell or pie dish.
6. Crumble cheese over the top, then cover with remaining broccoli.
7. Arrange the broccoli so stems point toward the center and flowers are on the outside.
8. Add the carrot and red pepper slices.
9. In a bowl, mix egg, dried oregano, and evaporated skim milk until combined.
10. Pour the mixture over the vegetables.
11. Cover loosely with foil for 1 hour or until the filling is set.
12. Remove the foil and bake uncovered for an additional 10 minutes.
Nutrient content per serving: 196 calories, 11 grams fat, 8 grams protein, 17 grams carbohydrate, 47 milligrams cholesterol, 336 milligrams sodium, 2.6 milligrams beta carotene.
